title: Multiple tables on a board without duplicating the Main Table

posts.author: Alexwallace (Alex Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be super helpful to be able to have multiple tables on a board without them reflecting the main table and duplicating it.

This would save having multiple boards for each project and keep things organised and central.

We have multiple projects and need to be able to have a hub of information.
